message:
feat(fwc): implement check_connector compliance validation for fwc new --check

Adds the check_connector() function that validates an existing connector
directory against FCP2 compliance requirements: manifest parsing and
validation, Cargo.toml workspace membership, required source files
(main.rs, lib.rs, connector.rs, limits.rs), zone policy presence,
sandbox profile, network constraint declarations, idempotency markers,
and AI hints. Returns a structured CheckResult with per-item pass/fail,
severity levels, suggested fixes, and an overall compliance score.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
